# TODO(W1-Day1): Wolfram Engine is not installed on this machine.
#
# To capture the real activation-prompt fixture, run the following on a machine
# where Wolfram Engine is installed but NOT yet activated:
#
#   wolframscript -code '1+1' 2>&1 > tests/fixtures/wolfram_activation_prompt.txt
#   echo "exit_code: $?" >> tests/fixtures/wolfram_activation_prompt.txt
#
# Then update the ACTIVATION_PATTERNS list in scripts/_activation_parse.py
# based on the exact strings observed in the output.
#
# Provisional patterns in _activation_parse.py cover likely substrings:
#   "activate", "Wolfram ID", "not activated", "activation required",
#   "license", "no valid password"
#
# Once captured, also create tests/fixtures/wolfram_ok.txt with the
# happy-path output from an activated Wolfram Engine:
#   wolframscript -code '1+1' 2>&1 > tests/fixtures/wolfram_ok.txt
